name: billing
title: Billing (Stripe subscriptions)
description: Stripe billing block: /pricing, /settings/billing, /api/billing/*, /api/stripe/webhook, stripe helpers, entitlements, billing migrations. Soft-fail missing Stripe; hard-fail misconfigured. Env: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, APP_URL, STRIPE_PRICE_ID_BASIC|PRO|TEAM.
